mapper.sql: id, user_id, session_token_hash, refresh_token_hash, issued_at, expires_at, revoked_at, revoke_reason, source_ip, revision
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_session (id, user_id, session_token_hash, refresh_token_hash, issued_at, expires_at, revoked_at, revoke_reason, source_ip, revision) VALUES (#{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{userId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{sessionTokenHash}, #{refreshTokenHash}, #{issuedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{expiresAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{revokedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{revokeReason}, #{sourceIp}, #{revision})
mapper.update:
UPDATE user_session SET revoked_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revoke_reason = #{reason}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revoked_at IS NULL
AND revision = #{expectedRevision}

UPDATE user_session SET revoked_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revoke_reason = #{reason}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revoked_at IS NULL AND revision = #{expectedRevision}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_session WHERE user_id = #{userId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revoked_at IS NULL AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at > #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler} ORDER BY issued_at ASC, id ASC
